subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Khaliq! The creation of the world hath been brought forth from nothingness into being for the knowledge of God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالخالق خلق عالم از برای معرفت حق جل جلاله از عدم بوجود آمده اند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
